title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB by building real-world projects.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master Figma, wireframing, prototyping, and user experience design principles.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Analyze data using Python, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, and machine learning basics.

title: Digital Marketing Essentials
description: Learn SEO, social media marketing, Google Ads, email marketing, and branding strategies.

title: Artificial Intelligence Fundamentals
description: Understand AI concepts, neural networks, deep learning, and build intelligent applications.

title: Cyber Security Basics
description: Learn ethical hacking, network security, encryption, and cyber attack prevention.

title: Mobile App Development with Flutter
description: Build beautiful Android and iOS applications using Flutter and Firebase.

title: Graphic Design with Adobe Photoshop
description: Create stunning graphics, social media posts, posters, and branding materials using Photoshop.
